_comment: Multi-click move speeds demo (#385): four identical Cavalry units (drill mode, no enemy) lined up side by side are each sent on the same 260 px move, one at a time, but with a different right-click count on the destination: 1 click = Walk, 2 = Jog, 3 = Run, 4 = Sprint. All four orders land within the first ~3 s, so the lanes visibly pull apart at different paces (trot/canter/gallop for cavalry) and the Walk unit is still only two-thirds of the way there once Sprint has already stopped -- the opposite of pace-modes.json's AUTO walk/jog/sprint transitions, which react to distance/fire rather than being chosen by the player via click count.
